# Spring Realty

## About
Spring Realty is a property consultancy specializing in Tatu City, Nairobi, Kenya. We help buyers find premium homes and investment properties in Kenya's first Special Economic Zone.

## What We Offer
- Luxury apartments at Jabali Towers (from KES 6.1M)
- Safari-inspired living at Porini Point (from KES 5.99M)
- Modern apartments at NEXT Amani (from KES 3.89M)
- Exclusive townhouses at 156 Elara by Mi Vida Homes (from KES 27.5M)
- Premium villas at Kijani Ridge (from KES 7M)

## Key Facts
- Tatu City: 5,000-acre master-planned city, 6,000+ residents, 110+ businesses
- Kenya's first Special Economic Zone (SEZ)
- Located along Thika Superhighway, 30 minutes from Nairobi CBD

## Properties
All properties listed are verified developments in Tatu City. We provide floor plans, pricing, payment plans, and developer brochures.
